title: Why arent they scared for dear life
display_title: Why arent they scared for dear life
wikitext:
[]: Why aren't they scared for dear life (spoilers, Believe it)             Quote Post by UltraBlackPilot » Sat Nov 28, 2009 2:02 am Going back over and watching 2.0, I noticed something a bit odd after the Bardiel fight. Shinji is on top of Nerv HQ stomping the shit out of it, and not one of them is scared for dear life. So yeah They could have did what they did at any time, but still. I mean you have a pissed off kid in a giant multi-billion dollar weapon designed to kickass above you.. That makes no sense to me, why no emotion!

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Nov 28, 2009 2:08 am Probably because the pissed off kid is Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Sat Nov 28, 2009 2:17 am Ornette wrote: Probably because the pissed off kid is Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by UltraBlackPilot » Sat Nov 28, 2009 2:20 am Ornette wrote: Probably because the pissed off kid is Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Nov 28, 2009 7:55 am Like in NGE some of them were probably scared but didn't show and tried to keep their cool and showed some extent of being worried.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sat Nov 28, 2009 8:31 am UltraBlackPilot wrote: Shinji can't suck that bad at intimidation that bad. Can he?

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Nov 28, 2009 12:18 pm Well there was about over a solid mile of pyramid and tunnels between Shinji and the control room.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Nov 28, 2009 3:03 pm Because they have the off switch, and he has zero fucking motive to go crazy and kill them all anyway.

[]:             Quote Post by firegirl26 » Sat Nov 28, 2009 3:29 pm Ornette wrote: Probably because the pissed off kid is Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Sat Nov 28, 2009 5:12 pm They deal with Godzilla shit every week, I think they're used to it by now.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Sat Nov 28, 2009 5:15 pm

[]:             Quote Post by UltraBlackPilot » Sat Nov 28, 2009 7:25 pm wonderluster wrote: They deal with Godzilla shit every week, I think they're used to it by now.

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Sun Nov 29, 2009 12:26 am UltraBlackPilot wrote: wonderluster wrote: They deal with Godzilla shit every week, I think they're used to it by now.

[]:             Quote Post by konfunoodle » Sun Nov 29, 2009 12:48 am Ornette wrote: Probably because the pissed off kid is Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by jayngfet » Sun Nov 29, 2009 2:26 am Ornette wrote: Probably because the pissed off kid is Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Sun Nov 29, 2009 2:15 pm What I was aiming to say was that Godzilla = Monster attacking Tokyo Angels = Monster attacking Tokyo Giant Robot = Monster with a personal attack on Tokyo Not saying Godzila's better than Unit 01 or whatever, I was simply statin lol

[]:             Quote Post by Hiten777 » Tue Dec 01, 2009 10:55 pm They're alluding to the NGE because despite the change in character roles its still an important scene to Shinji's development. It causes Shinji to assert his choice in not piloting Eva anymore, and it makes his return to piloting to save Rei all the more significant. Took Asuka's supposed death to break him from piloting, but it took Rei's crisis to bring him back. There's more importance of the characters this time. Rather than Shinji leaving because of Toji's accident and coming back because Kaji helped him realize the importance of piloting, Shinji himself willfully chose to come back instead of being told why he should pilot (Mari even told him to run).

[]:             Quote Post by UltraBlackPilot » Thu Dec 03, 2009 9:25 pm Hiten777 wrote: There's more importance of the characters this time.
